titleStmt.title: SII 9.110: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 110. (A.R. No. 290 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT PUNABAGATTA, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 974, Nandana, Pushya, śu. 1, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1052 December 24 Thursday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I) and mentions his feudatory Traiḷōkyamalla-Iṟivanoḷamba-Pallava-Permmānaḍi Nārasiṅghadēva. It records that Noḷambamahādēvi, the queen of Narasiṅghadēva, made a gift of land for the service of god Mahādēva of Hosageṟe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
saluttamire samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda pallavānvayaṁ
śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpura
varēsvaraṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamallaniṟivanoḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍi
nārasiṅghadēvaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇādbhudayasatasahaśraphaḷa
bhōgabhāgini svajanaparijanavyartthitārtthipradhānaka
ḷpalate śrīma(ṁ)nnārasiṅghadēvaviśāḷavakṣasthaḷanivā
siniyarappa śrīmannoḷaṁbamahādēviyar sakava
rṣa 974 neya nandanesaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 1 brihaspa
tivāra Uttarāyaṇasankrāntiyandu hosageṟeya mahā
dēvargge nivēdyakkaṁ pūjisuvava(ra)rgge grāsakkaṁ biṭṭa gaḻde mattarondu
beddale mattaru panneraḍu pūvinatōṭa vondu gāṇa vondu Idaṁ pra
tipāḷisidaṁge Asvamēdhaṁgeyda phaḷaṁ Idanaḷidaṁge bāṇa
rāsiyalu kavilayamaṁ brāhmaṇaruma(ṁ)naḷida paṁcamahāpāpa
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu pasundhari . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
śrāṇi vriṣṭānāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Idaṁ māḍisi pratipāḷisi
daṁ perggaḍe kāḷemayya .
Digital edition of SII 9.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
